title: 7.1.7 OAU Successes and Failures
description: 30 questions covering the achievements and shortcomings of the OAU and the transition to the AU

questions.question: What was the OAU's greatest success?
options: Decolonization and eradicating colonialism and white minority rule
questions.correctAnswer: Decolonization and eradicating colonialism and white minority rule

questions.question: Did the OAU successes outweigh its failures?
What was a major failure of the OAU?
options: It couldn't bring peace, prosperity, security, and stability
questions.correctAnswer: It couldn't bring peace, prosperity, security, and stability

questions.question: The OAU's powers were described as:
Which areas did the OAU have inadequate influence over?
options: Conflicts, poor governance, and human rights abuses
questions.correctAnswer: Conflicts, poor governance, and human rights abuses

questions.question: What challenge was the OAU incapable of meeting?

The OAU's greatest success was in the area of:

The OAU was described as having powers that were:

options: The OAU was a perfect organization
The OAU should expand its powers slowly

questions.question: The OAU was primarily unable to address challenges related to:
options: Globalization, good governance, and human rights
questions.correctAnswer: Globalization, good governance, and human rights

questions.question: The OAU failed to bring peace to African countries due to:
options: Too weak powers and inadequate influence
questions.correctAnswer: Too weak powers and inadequate influence

questions.question: Which of these is NOT a success of the OAU?
Reform of the OAU became imperative because:
options: Failures outweighed successes and it couldn't meet globalization challenges
questions.correctAnswer: Failures outweighed successes and it couldn't meet globalization challenges

options: Eradicating colonialism and white minority rule

options: Poor governance and human rights abuses
questions.correctAnswer: Poor governance and human rights abuses

options: Decolonization and eradicating white minority rule

options: Major success in decolonization but failure in achieving peace and prosperity
